subcodes.first_line: Our hearts rejoiced at thy letter concerning a school for girls. Praised be God that there is now a school of this type in Ṭihran
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الاعلی نامه ای که در خصوص مدرسه دختران مرقوم نموده بودی از قرائتش دلها
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @East and West; communication between East and West, @education of children; moral education
